title: 白嫖/低氪玩家开荒规划及攻略__写给计划入坑国服的萌新0904更新
summary: 前言的前言：特大喜讯：我宣布：9月底之前，不黑我接客周鸽鸽了~~既然送梨梨，那么所有无梨开荒的攻略全都没意义了，我这也要改一下呢前言：原本计划是国际服开服通关之后，写一篇白嫖开荒攻略的，结果开服前遭Jack周背刺，大改副本难度，尤其是炼狱难度增加各种免疫，抵抗，削弱所有拉条/打条相关，甚至大量副本B

143)"}]},{"type":"numbered-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"我个人强烈建议初始刷一个夜离"},{"type":"image","key":"ZYJfzLMgVkKT1qTV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_123/h_80/50364/100542/2025/6/31/47080.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"50px","height":"33px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，替代三系输出，剩下大量资源"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"    夜离可以从普池出，我所谓的刷初始，指的就是从普池抽夜离，"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"    当然，投入一定氪金量的玩家可以跳过这一步，因为UP卡池再黑80发保底也肯定出了，前期保底其实问题不大，抽卡给的原质结晶商店可以加快你的游戏进度。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"2. 七天任务领取一个绫罗"},{"type":"image","key":"ZtD4zD0W5oEXxohV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_114/h_76/50364/100542/2025/6/31/666227.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"46px","height":"31px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"3. 开服第一个UP池子，应该是芙蕾雅+克洛斯，有条件的话抽一个芙蕾雅"},{"type":"image","key":"ip4tL55g6HpWSNwi","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_125/h_74/50364/100542/2025/6/31/696710.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"55px","height":"33px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 240)"},{"text":"，五星即可"}]},{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"蝰蛇+黎黎+绫罗+夜离+颉草/任意BUFF，可以挂机完成地狱2的奥洛拉，我测试服挂完了地狱3奥罗拉，并且我还没有梨梨"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"  我的队伍供参考"},{"type":"image","key":"auEx6oN747bFd0LL","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_455/h_88/50364/100542/2025/8/4/272205.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"260px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，国服你有梨梨，换掉我图中的小熊座"}]},{"type":"bulleted-list","children":[{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"接下去要为开荒装备本炼狱做准备了，还是一样的，"},{"text":"50级之后，从","color":"rgb(255, 0, 0)"},{"color":"rgb(255, 0, 0)","text":"炼狱娜娜","bold":true},{"color":"rgb(255, 0, 0)","text":"开始，泡在里面，知道刷出三矩阵的智壳，替换上面的："}]},{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"根据自己BOX，选择一个能群体加速的SR卡（本人推荐妮璐"},{"type":"image","key":"ZyGUbIsvvhCdUmkl","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_117/h_78/50364/100542/2025/6/31/340005.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"47px","height":"32px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，甚至不需要吃技能），作为辅助（SSR上位替代是渺渺），去开荒炼狱妮可娜娜"},{"type":"image","key":"1ceyXDOEJOrPv86o","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_221/h_286/50364/100542/2025/6/31/401245.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"79px","height":"103px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，炼狱娜娜唯一的难度就在于你需要有群体加速，以及给娜娜上减速，这里推荐戍守卡其"},{"type":"image","key":"Nq0iDqGjxeckLDsh","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_117/h_77/50364/100542/2025/6/31/852662.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"46px","height":"30px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，脸黑抽不到的话，也可以用上面做好的蝰蛇"},{"type":"image","key":"J22sNiGR7hgxd7jh","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_116/h_76/50364/100542/2025/6/31/935901.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"56px","height":"37px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，有了这些，开荒妮可娜娜并没有多大难度。"}]},{"type":"list-item","children":[{"text":"这里需要肝，肝，肝，"},{"text":"把前面地狱尼可娜娜出的所有智壳，换成三矩阵的。","bgColor":"rgb(255, 77, 79)"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"到这里你需要做一个抉择了，如果你抽到了暗善"},{"type":"image","key":"jLENAxiyOwtPcGZs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_113/h_74/50364/100542/2025/6/31/367148.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"50px","height":"32px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"+赫同"},{"type":"image","key":"chjvAG4Fca0iSnJv","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_127/h_77/50364/100542/2025/6/31/574688.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"52px","height":"32px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，或者暗善+维罗妮卡"},{"type":"image","key":"OzSDQaOiGMmaYprF","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_188/h_105/50364/100542/2025/6/31/160892.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"56px","height":"31px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，那就先主攻开荒兵祸"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"开始做暗善"},{"type":"image","key":"jLENAxiyOwtPcGZs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_113/h_74/50364/100542/2025/6/31/367148.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"50px","height":"32px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，技能511，搭配"},{"text":"疾驰+时光驾驭","bgColor":"rgb(145, 213, 255)"},{"text":"的"},{"text":"千兆字节","bgColor":"rgb(255, 173, 210)"},{"text":"，六星全部拉满，命中越高越好"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"累积装备，肝，肝，肝"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"使用黎黎+颉草+赫同/维罗妮卡+暗善+戍守卡其开荒炼狱兵祸"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如果你没有暗善，那就先放弃炼狱兵祸，先开荒炼狱多琪和奥洛拉，之后用12+6+6的进阶装备，采用强杀的方式开荒炼狱兵祸会容易的多。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"开荒炼狱多琪和炼狱奥洛拉的队伍不变，需要的是你不断的累积装备，肝，肝，肝！","bgColor":"rgb(255, 169, 64)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bgColor":"rgb(255, 169, 64)","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bgColor":"rgb(251, 233, 230)","text":"期间你累积到了一定的装备，可以考虑去打炼狱赫妍"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bgColor":"rgb(251, 233, 230)","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"bgColor":"rgb(251, 233, 230)","text":"最后当你队伍累积到一定一定质变的时候，"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"选择类似","fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(212, 177, 6)","text":"光C"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(83, 29, 171)","text":"+暗"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)","text":"+"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","text":"异"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)","text":"+"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(56, 158, 13)","text":"虚"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)","text":"的"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)","text":"彩色","bgColor":"rgb(247, 89, 171)"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(0, 0, 0)","text":"队伍去开荒"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(207, 19, 34)","text":"炼狱津"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我这里说一下我个人的看法，由于炼狱津subtard的设定，进去之后BOSS开场会"},{"text":"随机","bold":true},{"text":"一个属性，之后开大之后，按照"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","text":"异"},{"text":"，然后是"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(56, 158, 13)","text":"虚，"},{"text":"然后是"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(34, 7, 94)","text":"暗"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(56, 158, 13)","text":"，"},{"text":"然后是"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(212, 177, 6)","text":"光，"},{"text":"然后是"},{"text":"理，","color":"rgb(207, 19, 34)","fontSize":"18px"},{"text":"的顺序进行循环。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"Mylhb6U6Pn9L6Q1Y","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_214/h_259/50364/100542/2025/7/1/469652.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"214px","height":"259px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"7PqHIYM5wc64UGeW","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_223/h_188/50364/100542/2025/7/1/371797.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"223px","height":"188px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"1MIONdcrxmsLgHNU","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_439/h_87/50364/100542/2025/7/1/333311.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"403px","height":"80px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这就要求我们尽量使用4个不同属性队伍去打，并且尽量少的使用被"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(9, 109, 217)","text":"异"},{"fontSize":"20px","color":"rgb(56, 158, 13)","text":"虚"},{"text":"克制的队友"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"按照前面练的队伍，目前最合适的选择就是，"},{"text":"夜离","color":"rgb(212, 177,
